# PerfectTales — Personalized AI Bedtime Stories for Kids

> PerfectTales is a mobile app (iOS) that creates personalized, AI-generated bedtime stories for children aged 3-11 with beautiful illustrations, customizable themes, and support for 55 languages.

## About

PerfectTales lets parents create unique bedtime stories where their child is the hero. Each story is generated using AI and features:

- The child's name and age built into the narrative
- Beautiful, AI-generated illustrations
- Age-appropriate vocabulary and content (ages 3-11)
- Rated 4+ on the App Store
- Zero data collection — full privacy

## Key Features

- **Personalized Characters**: Child's name and age integrated into every story
- **8 Story Themes**: Friendly Animals, Dragons, Magic & Spells, Fairy Tales, Space, Ocean Adventures, Unicorns, Robots
- **4 Art Styles**: Watercolor, Classic Storybook, Soft Pastel, Paper Craft
- **4 Moods**: Adventurous, Calming, Funny, Educational
- **Story Lengths**: 3, 5, or 7 minutes
- **Values-Based Lessons**: Embed meaningful life lessons in stories
- **55 Languages**: Generate stories in 55 different languages
- **Truly Unique**: Every story and every illustration is uniquely generated — no two are ever the same
- **Online Generation, Offline Reading**: Internet needed to generate stories via AI; once created, stories save automatically for offline access
- **Save Favorites**: Keep beloved characters and stories for later

## Pricing

- Free: Limited stories per week, all themes available
- Premium Weekly: $3.99/week — unlimited stories, all features
- Story Pack: $5.99 one-time — bundle of story credits

## Compatibility

- iPhone / iPad: iOS 15.1 or later
- Mac: macOS 12.0 or later (Apple M1 chip required)
- Apple Vision Pro: visionOS 1.0 or later

## Developer

- Name: Simon Majar
- App Size: 59.6 MB
- Category: Entertainment
- App Store ID: 6757753343
